message:
fix: preserve empty final_answer phase in history for gpt-5.3-codex

Three-layer fix:
1. Parser: when API returns empty text with phase annotation, still
   create a ContentPart so the phase is preserved
2. Serializer: when replaying assistant messages, allow empty text
   through when it carries a phase (so the API sees the model's
   previous final_answer state)
3. Session: separate "no content" (triggers retry) from "skip history"
   (only when no phase metadata either). Phase-only responses are
   retried but their turns are preserved in history so the model can
   see it entered final_answer mode and course-correct.

This fixes the root cause of gpt-5.3-codex's cascading empty responses:
the model's final_answer phase metadata was being silently erased,
preventing it from recognizing its own state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
